verdict_reason: New test exercises a violation scenario that the controller cannot actually produce, and skips the null-traceId branch its siblings cover

todos.issue: The test fixture mocks a violation on 'findAll.referenceNumber' with a REFERENCE_NUMBER_PATTERN message, but findAll's referenceNumber param carries no @Pattern — the scenario under test cannot occur in production and gives false confidence that search input is validated
todos.fix: Either add @Pattern to the controller param (making the fixture real) or rewrite the fixture around a violation that actually fires, e.g. @Min(1) on page

todos.issue: The new test asserts only status, title and the errors map — unlike the sibling MethodArgumentNotValid tests it never checks the null-traceId branch or the problem type URI/content type
todos.fix: Add a handleConstraintViolationException_shouldHandleNullTraceId case mirroring the existing handleValidationException_shouldHandleNullTraceId
